Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE

Name: Validation - IND
Text: However we cannot rule out natural variability We can only point out the pattern

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Potential mitigation suggestions Streamline document requests for high complexity claims possibly by providing comprehensive checklists upfront to avoid multiple rounds of requests Train adjusters to consolidate requests Implement guidelines that limit the number of separate request activities

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: If certain adjusters or regions are requesting more frequently analyze workload or expertise differences Could also consider automated reminders and deadlines for document submission to reduce cycle time
